content: We can reframe Self-Refine's single-perspective iterative self-improvement framework as a base that can be expanded by integrating multiple inconsistent self-perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, to create a multi-perspective self-refine framework that retains Self-Refine's core advantage of no additional training or supervision. This hybrid framework would enable the LLM to catch more flaws in its own initial output that a single-perspective self-refinement would miss, without increasing the method's dependency on external data.
